creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
can we test this some more to reduce where the bug is?
does this bug occur in php only setups like fpm, or is it an interaction with the Apache Httpd API?

I'm asking because no one associated with the Apache Httpd project has endorsed running PHP applications with mod_php for thirteen years.
The recommendation has been fpm + mod_proxy_fcgi: https://cwiki.apache.org/confluence/display/HTTPD/PHP-FPM
